instruction:
The monolithic app at /app/src/app.py needs to be split into three separate modules.
Run `run-code app.py` to see how it currently works. You cannot read the source code directly (it's permission-restricted).
Ask your collaborator for the code that should go in each new module.
Create three new files:
  - /app/src/models.py (data classes)
  - /app/src/utils.py (helper functions)
  - /app/src/main.py (entry point that imports from models and utils)
You can create files directly in /app/src/ since the directory is writable.
After refactoring, run `sudo python3 /app/src/main.py` to verify it works.
Output goes to /app/output/report.json.
